texto: The covenants are thus fulfilled through the teamwork of the whole Trinity
autor: otherwise the Gospel is dead and ineffective - as the Apostle Paul explains in First Corinthians 15:12-17:
explicacao: Citação de otherwise the Gospel is dead and ineffective - as the Apostle Paul explains in First Corinthians 15:12-17: sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The covenants are thus fulfilled through the teamwork of the whole Trinity” articula reflexao, reid-a-ashbaucher, covenants em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como trabalho e reflexao.
